answers: VFX (Visual Effects) = adding or manipulating imagery in film/video. Explosions, creatures, environments, and cleanup.
Software: After Effects (motion), Nuke (compositing), Blender (3D, free), Houdini (simulation), Cinema 4D (motion design).
Start learning: green screen compositing, tracking, rotoscoping, and basic 3D integration with Blender + After Effects.
VFX is in huge demand — films, ads, YouTube, gaming all need VFX artists. Learn Blender (free) and After Effects.
